content.en:
To get from the first floor of the Ultimate Tower to the second floor, you need to defeat a Guardian.

Ye Tian tried, but he couldn't beat this guardian, not because his strength was not good, but because he couldn't hit it.

How powerful his Ultimate Arcane is to tear the sky, with the strength of his Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Lord to perform such an Ultimate Arcane, an ordinary Eternal Level Ultimate Realm Lord will definitely not be able to bear it.

As a result, if you can't beat the opponent, you naturally can't defeat the opponent.

"Strange, why can't you hit the other party?"

Ye Tian tried again.

......

An ultimate void.

Ye Tian fought with the Guardian again, this Guardian was a black giant figure with a large size.

However, Ye Tian once again cast the ultimate arcane such as Flash Step to kill the opponent, and then cast the Sky Tearing Slash at the opponent.

But at the critical moment, the black giant dodged his ultimate arcane in time and attacked him.

Bang!!!

Ye Tian was knocked away, although the opponent's attack power was not very strong, but he was very frustrated by the failure again.

"I didn't expect I to even be able to break through to the first floor!"

Eventually, he gave up and retreated to the first floor.

After that, he saw that the other ten Immortal Rank Ultimate Realm Masters had not broken through the first layer, and he was in a better mood.

"This first level is so difficult, how are we going to get out?"

An Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Lord complained.

"There must be skills, otherwise, you won't even be able to go to the second floor. Another Immortal-level Ultimate Realm Lord said.

"How the hell can you get through this?"

The other Immortal-level Ultimate Realm Lords asked.

However, none of these Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Lords had an accurate statement, or they knew a little bit about the situation, but they were unwilling to reveal it, and they just wanted to extract useful information from the mouths of other Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Lords.

Ye Tian didn't bother to listen anymore, he was going to break through again, and then study it carefully, maybe he could study how to defeat this guardian.

In the years that followed, Ye Tian went again and again.

After countless attempts, he finally understood why he couldn't pass the first hurdle, not because of his strength, but because his realm was not enough.

This realm is not the realm of the ultimate rule, or the realm of the Eternal Ultimate Realm Master, but the realm of the use of the ultimate path is insufficient.

When the Eternal Level Ultimate Realm Lord reached this realm, he rarely went to fight, and his use was actually very superficial.

And the ultimate arcane is one of the advanced applications, Ye Tian can comprehend the ultimate arcane, it is indeed very good, but he seems to have skipped a process.

That is to turn the power of the Ultimate Way into instinct, and even affect the surrounding environment, so that he can control everything during the battle.

That guardian has managed everything, even if it is the ultimate arcane, no matter how fast it is, ignoring the time distance, as long as it is affected by the power of the other party, there will be a gap, and you can react and dodge.

In other words, when Ye Tian and the other party fought in that ultimate void, that ultimate void was actually under the control of the other party, which was equivalent to the opponent's domain, and naturally there would be a situation where the opponent could not be hit.

"It is not difficult to influence the instinct of the ultimate path to the surrounding void~!"

Ye Tian began to try.

Time passed slowly.

After a long time, Ye Tian finally did it, letting the ultimate Dao of the Demon Hell instinctively affect the surrounding void, and he suddenly saw a different void, and also saw through the traces of the guardian.

"Tear the sky!"

Ye Tian slashed away with one blow, and all the traces of the other party were snooped on by him, no matter how the other party dodged, he was finally hit by him.

Under the ultimate arcane, this guardian was directly killed!

Wow!

Ye Tian came from the first layer of the Ultimate Tower to the second layer, and he was also the first Immortal-level Ultimate Realm Lord to enter the second layer of the Ultimate Tower.

When Ye Tian came to the second layer.

A mysterious ultimate void.

The ultimate projection chats here.

"Hahahaha, everyone, how about this Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Lord I selected, the first one to enter the second layer!"

Doomsday Supreme said excitedly.

"Doomsday Extreme, this is just the beginning, the ultimate tower has a total of thirty-six floors, what is the second floor, who wins is not certain!"

"Hehe, do you dare to raise the ante?"

"Dare!"

"Okay, then up the ante!"

This group of Ultimate Extremes raised the ante, no matter how big the bet was to them, it was just a little fun for them in the Infinite Ultimate Era.

But for an Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Lord like Ye Tian and them, it was an ordeal, and of course, it was also an opportunity.

......

The second floor of the Ultimate Tower.

Ye Tian came here and saw a stone tablet.

This stele can actually assist in the comprehension of the ultimate rule, and the effect is very good.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian stayed here to comprehend the ultimate rule, and he was not in a hurry to go to the third layer.

The first layer of forks.

Some other Immortal-level Ultimate Realm Masters found that Ye Tian was gone, and guessed that Ye Tian had entered the second layer, and they were envious one by one.

"The Ten Thousand Laws Supreme Venerable should have gone to the second layer!

"Do you not know how to clear the customs? It's just that you haven't met the requirements yet!"

"Hmph, I'll go to cultivate, I'll strive to be the second Immortal Level Ultimate Realm Lord to go to the second layer!"

And just like that, another long time passed.
